niche: Technology tutorials / digital media (3 separate channels)
description: Three faceless YouTube channels producing tech tutorial content (screen recordings + AI voiceover). Launched in late 2022. Topics span general tech, software tutorials, and digital tools. No face, no persona — fully interchangeable operators. ~10,000 total published videos. Owner spends ~1hr/week.

verifiedTrends.note: EF-quoted 12-month average overstates current run rate — use last 6-month avg for valuation

monthlyData.note: Peak Jan 25 $5,058 → Dec 25 $3,428. 6-month avg ~$3,389 vs EF 12-month avg $3,900. EF average is inflated by the early peak.

channelStats.format: Screen recording + AI voiceover — no face, no persona
channelStats.niche: Tech tutorials — Python, AI tools, software, digital media

earningsAnalysis.trend: DECLINING — down 33% from Jan 2025 peak ($5,058) to Dec 2025 ($3,428)
earningsAnalysis.fairValueMultiple: 23x on current $3,389/month run rate = ~$78K fair value
earningsAnalysis.note: Decline likely due to AI disruption of tech tutorial niche — ChatGPT/Perplexity answers many how-to queries without needing a video

sellerQandA.workRequired: ~1 hour per week — fully outsourced production
sellerQandA.transferAssets: All 3 YouTube channels + AdSense account + content creation workflow
sellerQandA.growthOpportunities: Expand to new AI tool tutorials, increase upload frequency, add memberships

risks: Revenue DECLINING 33% from Jan 2025 peak — trend is down, not flat
AI disruption risk: tech tutorial niche is most vulnerable to ChatGPT/Perplexity replacing video tutorials
EF-quoted 12-month average ($3,900) overstates current $3,389/month run rate by 15%
Asking $93K = 27.6x on current run rate — expensive for a declining asset
Tech niche may face accelerating competition from AI-native content creators
3 channels = 3x algorithm dependency risk (any one channel demonetized hits 33% of revenue)
opportunities: 10,000 existing videos = massive long-tail traffic library with compounding effect
Pivot to AI tool tutorials (fastest-growing tech sub-niche) to reverse decline
Add YouTube memberships + sponsorships — easy at current view volume
3-channel structure diversifies algorithm risk vs single channel
Fully faceless — any AI can script, any operator can run
Expand to Shorts for additional AdSense revenue stream

negotiationStrategy.justification: Current 6-month average is $3,389/month, not the EF-quoted $3,900. Fair value at 23x = $77,947. Declining trend justifies further discount. Target $79K max.
negotiationStrategy.walkAwayConditions: Walk if seller insists on >$82K or if verified data shows accelerating decline in Jan-Feb 2026
